title: phalangium sulphureum
intro: Phalangium sulphureum, also known as the sulfur adder's tongue, is a type of orchid that belongs to the Ophiglossum genus. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Phalangium sulphureum include relieving coughs, soothing sore throats, and reducing inflammation in the body. Herbal preparations of Phalangium sulphureum can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to support respiratory health and alleviate symptoms associated with colds and flu.
